name: BeeEye1960
comment: Big Bee Eye LED Moving Head Wash Light 1960W: With 19x40W(RGBW / 4-IN-1) LEDs, variable motorized zoom (3.5 – 50 degrees), and individual  pixel control, capable of creating a kaleidoscope effect. It not only has a beam zoom wash  visual effect but also has built-in various macro function effects.

gwSpecs.description: With 19x40W(RGBW / 4-IN-1) LEDs, variable motorized zoom (3.5 – 50 degrees), and individual  pixel control, capable of creating a kaleidoscope effect. It not only has a beam zoom wash  visual effect but also has built-in various macro function effects.
